name: eggs
description: Integrates Codex with the Eggs animated desktop companion. Shows user prompts, tool activity, permission requests, and stop summaries as local pet bubbles while bundling the full Eggs desktop companion skill.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn a roaming desktop sprite companion and show Codex events as pet bubbles.
interface.longDescription: Eggs bundles the full desktop companion skill together with Codex hook integration, so prompts, tool activity, permission requests, and agent stop summaries appear as interactive local pet bubbles.
defaultPrompt: Use $eggs to spawn an animated desktop companion.
Show Codex hook events as Eggs pet bubbles.
Stop or switch the current Eggs companion state.
